scope: Revenue Outlook lazy render and default sensitivity fast path
finding: Revenue Outlook reruns paid about 647.91 ms for default sensitivity audit/overlay work and rendered multiple audit/table sections eagerly.
change: Added cached selector/view helpers keyed by runtime signature and controls, skipped default sensitivity overlay work, and moved heavy audit/detail sections behind explicit lazy toggles.

scope: Revenue Outlook lightweight primary bridge path
finding: The default cached primary view still materialized line reconciliation, formula residual and stack-component frames before any detail section was opened.
change: Added an include_derived_frames switch to the PED bridge layer, used a lightweight bridge path for the default primary cached view, and added a separate cached detail-frame helper for composition, reconciliation and PED diagnostics.

evidence.tests: focused primary/detail split tests passed before full validation

scope: Revenue Outlook PED bridge audit matching
finding: The remaining default primary bridge path still checked unmatched rows by scanning every PED bridge audit key.
change: Replaced the row-scan fallback with exact, no-source, no-fed and no-source/no-fed lookup maps that preserve the original matching order.

evidence.parity: Inline parity check matched old row-scan behavior for chart, bridge, future and line frames.
evidence.tests: Focused fallback semantics and primary-view tests passed before full validation.
